whyUs.title: What Sets Us Apart From Standard Oil Traders
whyUs.subtitle: We manage the entire export process — from technical product matching to customs documentation and freight coordination.
whyUs.feature1Desc: Our engineers help you identify the correct specification for your application, engine type, and operating conditions.
whyUs.feature2Desc: COA, MSDS, Certificate of Origin, SASO, and country-specific compliance documents prepared in-house.
whyUs.feature3Desc: 205L drums, 1,000L IBCs, 20L pails, and bulk tanker quantities. All packaging UN-approved for international transit.
whyUs.feature4Desc: Every batch tested against specification before shipment. Certificate of Analysis available on request.
whyUs.feature5Desc: Single point of contact from order confirmation to delivery. Proactive communication on lead times and documentation.
whyUs.feature6Desc: T/T and Letter of Credit accepted. USD and EUR invoicing. Net payment terms for verified institutional buyers.

process.title: How to Place a Bulk Order
process.subtitle: A straightforward 5-step process from inquiry to delivery.
process.step1Desc: Describe product type, volume, destination, and timeline via our quote form or email.
process.step2Desc: Our technical team identifies the correct specifications and prepares a formal quotation within 24–48 hours.
process.step3Desc: Upon approval, we generate proforma invoice, COA, MSDS, and all required export documentation.
process.step4Desc: Batch prepared and ISO 9001:2015 quality tested. Inspection reports available on request.
process.step5Desc: Goods shipped via your preferred Incoterm. Tracking and shipping documents provided within 24 hours of dispatch.

samplePosts.excerpt: An engineer-level guide to SAE J300 viscosity grades — covering kinematic viscosity at 40°C and 100°C, HTHS requirements, and selection for tropical and cold climates.

about.headline: 15 Years of Industrial Lubricant Export
about.subheadline: A Bursa-based manufacturer and exporter. ISO 9001:2015 certified. 40+ active export markets. We build long-term supply relationships, not one-time transactions.
about.para1: Model Oils is a lubricant manufacturer and bulk exporter headquartered in Bursa, Turkey. We blend and package motor oils, mineral oils, and industrial lubricants at our facility in Nilüfer, Bursa, and export to distributors, importers, fleet operators, and industrial companies worldwide.
about.para2: Founded in 2009, we spent our first years building technical credibility in the Turkish domestic market before expanding internationally in 2012. Today, we export to 40+ countries across MENA, Sub-Saharan Africa, Southeast Asia, Central Asia, and Europe — with active freight lanes and established customs experience in each region.
about.para3: We are not a trading company. Every product we export is blended and packaged at our own facility. This means consistent quality, traceable batches, and a technical team that knows every formulation we sell.
about.v1Desc: Every product claim is backed by independent laboratory test data. We publish TDS and SDS for every product and provide batch-specific COA with every shipment.
about.v2Desc: B2B buyers stake supply chains on our consistency. We maintain strict production schedules, proactive communication, and a 98.6% on-time delivery rate.
about.v3Desc: International buyers deserve the same documentation standards as domestic buyers. We treat customs compliance, language accuracy, and certificate validity as non-negotiables.
about.v4Desc: We do not optimize for one-time transactions. Our pricing, terms, and account management are structured to make long-term partnership commercially logical for both sides.
about.m2009: Founded in Istanbul, initially supplying domestic automotive distributors.
about.m2012: First export contract — 205L drums to Libyan automotive sector.
about.m2015: ISO 9001:2015 certification achieved. Expanded to 12 export markets.
about.m2018: API licensing obtained for motor oil product line. New blending facility commissioned.
about.m2021: Reached 30+ active export countries. ISO 14001 environmental certification added.
about.m2024: 40+ countries served. 12,000+ metric tons exported annually. Private label program launched.
about.ctaBody: Get a bulk quote or contact our export team to discuss your requirements.

contact.headline: Contact Our Export Team
contact.subheadline: Whether you need a bulk quote, technical product matching, or export documentation — our team is ready to assist.
contact.iq1Desc: Get pricing for motor oils, mineral oils, or industrial lubricants. Includes full spec sheet and documentation package.
contact.iq2Desc: Not sure which product is right for your application? Our engineers will match the correct specification to your equipment, OEM requirements, and climate.
contact.iq3Desc: Need ISO certificates, COA, MSDS, Halal certificates, or country-specific compliance documents? We prepare all standard export documentation in-house.
contact.iq4Desc: Interested in exclusive distribution rights for your region? We partner with established lubricant distributors and importers worldwide.
contact.whatsappNote: WhatsApp available 24/7 for urgent export inquiries.
contact.commitmentBody: All quote requests submitted via the form are acknowledged within 2 hours during business hours and receive a full quotation within 24–48 business hours.
contact.ctaBody: Use our structured quote form for the fastest response from our export team.
contact.cm1Desc: Preferred channel for international clients. Typically responds within 2 hours.
contact.cm3Desc: General questions, partnership proposals, media inquiries.
contact.cm4Desc: For bulk quotes, shipping logistics, and documentation requests.

exportSvc.headline: Full-Service Export from Istanbul to 40+ Countries
exportSvc.subheadline: We manage everything: FOB/CIF/DAP pricing, full documentation package, quality certification, and freight coordination. Your supply chain, simplified.
exportSvc.c1Desc: 205L drums, 1,000L IBCs, 20L pails, bulk tanker. All UN-approved for international transit.
exportSvc.c2Desc: Active shipping lanes to MENA, Africa, Europe, Asia. Established freight partnerships for competitive rates.
exportSvc.c3Desc: Full export documentation package prepared by our trade compliance team. No third-party delays.
exportSvc.c4Desc: Direct relationships with international freight forwarders from Istanbul port. Weekly sailings to major trade corridors.
exportSvc.c5Desc: Every shipment accompanied by batch-specific Certificate of Analysis. ISO 9001:2015 quality management throughout.
exportSvc.c6Desc: T/T (30/70 split or 100% advance), Letters of Credit at sight. USD and EUR invoicing. Institutional net terms available.
exportSvc.containerNote: Reference data for planning your container shipment. Actual capacity may vary based on gross weight limits and packing configuration.
exportSvc.containerFootnote: Weight limits: Standard 20ft container max payload ~28MT; 40ft max ~28MT. Consult your freight forwarder for port-specific restrictions.
exportSvc.incotermsNote: We support all major Incoterms. Your preferred trade term should be specified in the quote request.
exportSvc.exwDesc: Buyer arranges all transport from our Istanbul warehouse.
exportSvc.fobDesc: We load goods onto the vessel at Port of Istanbul. Most common.
exportSvc.cfrDesc: We pay freight to destination port. Buyer handles insurance.
exportSvc.cifDesc: We cover freight + cargo insurance to destination port.
exportSvc.dapDesc: Goods delivered to buyer's facility — buyer handles import customs.
exportSvc.ddpDesc: Complete door-to-door service including import customs clearance.
exportSvc.docNote: Every shipment includes our standard export documentation package. All documents are prepared in English and can be apostilled or legalized on request.
exportSvc.regionsNote: We have established freight lanes and customs experience in the following markets.
exportSvc.ttDesc: 30% advance deposit upon proforma invoice confirmation. 70% balance before shipment release. Preferred for first-time orders.
exportSvc.lcDesc: Irrevocable L/C at sight accepted from established international banks. Confirm L/C requirements prior to order placement.
exportSvc.netDesc: Net-30 and Net-60 payment terms available for institutional buyers with established order history and credit approval.
exportSvc.currencyNote: Currency accepted: USD and EUR. Exchange rate risk borne by buyer on non-USD currencies.
exportSvc.ctaTitle: Ready to Start Your Export Order?
exportSvc.ctaBody: Get a competitive quotation including shipping, documentation, and quality certification within 24 hours.

certPage.headline: Certified Quality You Can Verify
certPage.subheadline: ISO 9001:2015 certified operations. API-licensed motor oils. ACEA-compliant formulations. Full documentation package for procurement approval.
certPage.docsNote: Our trade compliance team prepares all standard export documentation in-house. Full documentation packages are typically delivered within 24 hours of order confirmation.
certPage.qa1Desc: Base oils and additives tested against specification on receipt. Non-conforming materials are quarantined and returned to supplier.
certPage.qa2Desc: Blending batches are sampled at intervals during production. Viscosity, flash point, and density verified at each stage.
certPage.qa3Desc: Each finished batch undergoes full specification testing before release. Batch-specific COA generated and archived.
certPage.qa4Desc: Random sampling from sealed containers before loading. Third-party SGS inspection available on request for large orders.

brandPage.motorOilsCardDesc: Fully synthetic, semi-synthetic and mineral motor oils for automotive, heavy duty and passenger vehicles.
brandPage.industrialLubsCardDesc: Industrial lubricants including hydraulic, gear, compressor, grease and metalworking fluids.
brandPage.notFoundHelp: Can't find the product you need? Let our export team help.
brandPage.motorCatDesc: Motor oils for automotive, heavy duty, and passenger vehicles.
brandPage.industrialCatDesc: Industrial lubricants including hydraulic, gear, compressor, and grease.

helix-ultra-0w-20.description: A fully synthetic motor oil developed for the most demanding conditions. Its ultra-low viscosity formula delivers superior cold-start protection and improved fuel efficiency.

helix-ultra-0w-30.description: A fully synthetic motor oil meeting European OEM standards. VW and Mercedes-Benz approved, ideal for modern petrol and diesel engines.

helix-ultra-0w-40.description: A fully synthetic motor oil developed for high-performance sports and luxury vehicles. Porsche and Mercedes-Benz approved, delivering maximum engine protection under extreme conditions.

helix-ultra-5w-30.description: One of the most popular fully synthetic motor oils. BMW and Mercedes-Benz long-drain service approved, delivering excellent protection across a wide range of vehicles.

helix-ultra-5w-40.description: A fully synthetic motor oil with excellent performance across a wide temperature range. Volkswagen and Porsche approved, suitable for both daily and high-performance use.

helix-ultra-ect-c2-c3-0w-30.description: A fully synthetic motor oil compatible with DPF and TWC emission control systems. Dual ACEA C2/C3 certification protects modern emission control systems.

helix-ultra-ect-c3-5w-30.description: A fully synthetic motor oil specifically approved for BMW, Mercedes-Benz and Volkswagen modern emission control systems. Ideal for vehicles with DPF and GPF filters.

helix-ultra-professional-ab-l-0w-30.description: A fully synthetic motor oil developed exclusively for Ford vehicles. Low-viscosity formulation meeting Ford's latest WSS-M2C913-D standard.

helix-ultra-professional-af-5w-20.description: A fully synthetic motor oil specifically designed for Ford EcoBoost and other Ford petrol engines. Low-friction formulation for fuel savings.

helix-ultra-professional-ag-5w-30.description: A GM dexos2 licensed fully synthetic motor oil for General Motors and Opel vehicles. Meets the high performance standard GM mandates for its global vehicle fleet.

helix-ultra-professional-am-l-5w-30.description: A fully synthetic motor oil meeting Mercedes-Benz's latest Low-SAPS standard MB 229.52. Provides DPF protection in modern Mercedes diesel and petrol engines.

helix-ultra-professional-av-l-0w-30.description: A fully synthetic motor oil meeting Volkswagen Group's highest standard VW 504 00/507 00. Ideal for VW, Audi, Skoda and Seat diesel vehicles.

helix-ultra-professional-av-5w-30.description: VW 504/507 approved fully synthetic motor oil for VW Group vehicles. Delivers superior protection and extended service intervals in TSI and TDI engines.

helix-hx8-5w-30.description: A high-performance motor oil produced with Shell's synthetic technology formula. Offers protection comparable to full synthetic with broader application compatibility.

helix-hx8-5w-40.description: A synthetic technology motor oil offering excellent protection across a wide viscosity range. VW and Mercedes-Benz approved, suitable for both petrol and diesel engines.

helix-hx8-10w-40.description: A synthetic technology motor oil with excellent performance in hot climates and high operating temperatures. Suitable for both new and high-mileage engines.

helix-hx8-ect-5w-30.description: A synthetic technology motor oil for vehicles with emission control systems. Provides low-ash advantage in DPF-equipped diesel and catalytic converter-equipped petrol vehicles.

helix-hx7-5w-40.description: An ideal semi-synthetic motor oil for a wide range of vehicles. Combines the advantages of mineral and fully synthetic oils for economical and effective protection.

helix-hx7-10w-40.description: A semi-synthetic motor oil suitable for both petrol and diesel engines. Provides reliable engine protection in hot climates and urban driving.

helix-hx7-15w-40.description: A reliable semi-synthetic motor oil designed for hot climates and older generation engines. High-viscosity formulation provides protection at elevated temperatures.

helix-hx7-av-l-5w-30.description: An economical VW 504/507 approved semi-synthetic motor oil for VW Group vehicles. Provides DPF protection in TDI engines while offering a budget-friendly alternative.

helix-hx6-10w-40.description: A reliable semi-synthetic motor oil developed for everyday use. Wide engine and vehicle compatibility meets standard maintenance requirements.

helix-hx5-15w-40.description: A reliable mineral motor oil meeting standard maintenance requirements. Provides basic engine protection in older generation petrol and diesel engines.

helix-hx5-20w-50.description: A high-viscosity mineral motor oil designed for use in high-temperature conditions and high-mileage engines. Provides reliable protection in hot climates.

helix-hx3-20w-50.description: An economical mineral motor oil. Provides minimum engine protection for standard maintenance programs. Suitable for older and high-mileage engines.

rimula-r2-extra-15w-40.description: A reliable motor oil developed for heavy-duty diesel engines. Multi-additive package delivers reliable protection and extended engine life in diesel vehicles.

rimula-r3-15w-40.description: A mineral-based motor oil designed for global heavy-duty diesel engines. Cummins, MAN, Volvo and Mercedes-Benz approvals provide an economical solution for large fleets.

rimula-r3-multi-10w-30.description: A multi-grade heavy-duty motor oil with excellent performance at both low and high temperatures. Wide operating temperature range ensures cold start and hot protection.

rimula-r4-l-15w-40.description: A high-performance motor oil developed for heavy-duty truck and bus engines. Delivers superior deposit control in engines with EGR (Exhaust Gas Recirculation) systems.

rimula-r4-x-15w-40.description: A superior-performance motor oil developed for high-stress heavy-duty engines. Provides extra protection in demanding operating conditions with a stronger additive package than R4 L.

rimula-r5-e-10w-40.description: A synthetic technology heavy-duty motor oil designed for extended service intervals. Delivers outstanding deposit control in modern EGR engines and reliable protection in stop-start operations.

rimula-r5-le-10w-40.description: A synthetic technology motor oil developed for low-emission advanced heavy-duty engines. Optimized for Euro engines while offering comparable features to R5 E.

rimula-r6-lme-5w-30.description: A fully synthetic motor oil developed for Euro 6 heavy-duty engines equipped with SCR and DPF filters. Environmentally friendly formula with the lowest sulphur content.

rimula-r6-me-5w-30.description: A fully synthetic motor oil specifically optimized for Mercedes-Benz heavy-duty vehicles. MB 228.51 approved, delivering the longest service intervals for Actros and other MB trucks.

tellus-s2-mx-32.description: A high-performance mineral hydraulic oil developed for industrial hydraulic systems. Superior thermal and oxidation stability ensures long system life and equipment protection.

tellus-s2-mx-46.description: A hydraulic oil developed in the most commonly used industrial viscosity grade. Ideal for general-purpose hydraulic systems operating at constant temperatures.

tellus-s2-mx-68.description: A mineral hydraulic oil designed for hydraulic systems operating at high temperatures and under heavy loads. Suitable for industrial presses and large construction equipment.

tellus-s2-mx-100.description: A mineral hydraulic oil developed for large hydraulic systems requiring high viscosity applications and extra load capacity. Ideal for heavy presses and industrial facilities.

tellus-s3-m-46.description: An environmentally friendly hydraulic oil with zinc-free ash-free formulation. Ideal for sensitive hydraulic systems and servo valves containing silver and magnesium alloy components.

omala-s2-gx-150.description: A high-pressure (EP) gear oil developed for closed industrial gearboxes. Provides superior gear protection and long-life service under high loads.

omala-s2-gx-220.description: A most commonly used EP gear oil in industrial gear viscosity. Provides excellent protection in reducers, conveyor systems and general industrial gearboxes.

omala-s2-gx-320.description: A heavy-duty EP gear oil developed for high-load, low-speed applications. Provides reliable protection in large industrial reducers and crane systems.

omala-s2-gx-460.description: A heavy-viscosity EP gear oil developed for large industrial gear systems operating at very low speeds and very high loads. Ideal for open-pit mining and steel industry applications.

corena-s3-r-46.description: A synthetic technology compressor oil developed for rotary screw and vane compressors. Extended change intervals up to 4,000 hours reduce operating costs.

corena-s4-r-46.description: A fully synthetic compressor oil developed for rotary screw compressors. Extended change intervals up to 8,000 hours and superior thermal stability make it ideal for high-temperature systems.

gadus-s2-v220-2.description: A general-purpose high-load capacity lithium complex grease. Delivers superior protection across a wide range of industrial applications including rolling bearings, gearboxes and centrifugal pumps.

morlina-s2-bl-10.description: A high-quality lubricating oil developed for steam turbines, gas turbines and circulation systems. Excellent water separation and long-life oxidation stability ensure uninterrupted operation.

tonna-s3-m-68.description: A special slideway oil developed for machine tool slideways and sliding tables. Anti-stick-slip formulation ensures precise feed motion and vibration-free operation.

diala-s4-zx-i.description: An ultra high-performance mineral insulating oil developed for power transformers and high-voltage switching equipment. Superior thermal and electrical properties ensure long equipment life.

1-esp-x2-0w-20.description: An ultra-low viscosity fully synthetic motor oil meeting BMW's latest efficiency standard LL-17FE+. Maximizes fuel economy while delivering superior engine protection.

1-esp-0w-30.description: A fully synthetic ESP motor oil developed specifically for Mercedes-Benz and Porsche vehicles. ACEA C3 certification provides superior protection in DPF-equipped vehicles.

1-esp-5w-30.description: A fully synthetic ESP motor oil with the widest OEM approval portfolio. Provides DPF protection and extended service intervals in BMW, Mercedes-Benz and Volkswagen Group vehicles.

1-esp-x4-0w-40.description: A fully synthetic ESP motor oil developed for high-performance sports and luxury vehicles. Provides maximum engine protection and fuel efficiency across a wide temperature range.

1-fs-5w-40.description: A fully synthetic motor oil trusted by millions of vehicles worldwide. Wide OEM approval portfolio provides excellent protection for both European and global vehicle models.

1-new-life-0w-40.description: A fully synthetic motor oil that protects your engine from the very first kilometre. Formulation optimized for Mercedes-Benz and Porsche high-performance engines delivers superior oxidation resistance.

super-3000-fe-5w-30.description: A fuel-economy focused fully synthetic motor oil. Low-friction formulation delivering excellent performance in Ford EcoBoost engines makes it ideal for everyday use.

super-3000-x1-5w-40.description: A reliable fully synthetic motor oil for a wide range of vehicles. High temperature protection and extended engine cleanliness provide superior performance in heavy urban traffic.

super-2000-10w-40.description: A semi-synthetic motor oil providing reliable protection across a wide range of vehicles. Economical formulation meets standard maintenance needs in both petrol and diesel engines.

delvac-1-esp-5w-30.description: A fully synthetic ESP motor oil developed for latest-generation heavy-duty diesel engines. Fully compatible with SCR and DPF systems with Low-SAPS formulation meeting Euro 6 standards.

delvac-1-esp-5w-40.description: A high-performance fully synthetic motor oil for heavy-duty truck and bus engines. Extended service intervals and superior deposit control reduce operating costs.

delvac-1300-super-15w-40.description: A reliable and economical mineral motor oil for heavy-duty diesel engines. Wide OEM approval portfolio provides a cost-effective solution for large fleets.

super-1000-15w-40.description: A reliable mineral motor oil meeting standard maintenance requirements. Economical choice providing basic protection in older generation petrol and diesel engines.

dte-10-excel-32.description: A premium hydraulic oil delivering consistent performance across a wide temperature range with high viscosity index. Particularly ideal for outdoor machinery and mobile hydraulic systems.

dte-10-excel-46.description: A high VI hydraulic oil in the most commonly used industrial hydraulic system viscosity grade. Provides superior pump protection in both in-plant and mobile equipment.

dte-10-excel-68.description: A high VI hydraulic oil designed for heavy-duty hydraulic systems operating at high temperatures. Provides reliable performance in construction and mining equipment.

dte-10-excel-100.description: A high-viscosity premium hydraulic oil for large hydraulic systems requiring extra load capacity. Provides reliable protection in heavy presses and large construction equipment.

shc-630.description: A PAO-based fully synthetic industrial gear oil. Delivers much longer service intervals than mineral oils and superior low-temperature performance with superior gear protection in harsh operating conditions.

shc-632.description: A PAO-based fully synthetic gear oil in the most common industrial gear viscosity grade. Provides 3x longer service life than mineral oils in reducers and closed gearboxes.

rarus-427.description: A high-performance mineral compressor oil developed for air compressors. Delivers long-life performance and low carbon deposits in reciprocating and rotary screw compressors.

rarus-shc-1024.description: A PAO-based fully synthetic compressor oil developed for rotary screw compressors. Extended change intervals up to 8,000 hours and zero carbon deposits reduce operating costs.

vactra-2.description: A special slideway oil developed for CNC machines and precision machine tools. Eliminates stick-slip vibrations for precise surface finish and feed consistency.

grease-xhp-222.description: A high-performance EP grease with lithium complex thickener. Provides superior protection across a wide range of industrial applications including rolling bearings, gearboxes and joint points.

edge-0w-20.description: Castrol's most advanced fully synthetic motor oil. Equipped with Titanium FST technology, EDGE 0W-20 strengthens the film between engine parts for superior wear protection.

edge-0w-30.description: A BMW and Mercedes-Benz approved fully synthetic motor oil. Low-friction formulation delivers fuel savings while providing superior engine protection.

edge-5w-30.description: The most popular Castrol EDGE viscosity. BMW, Mercedes-Benz and Volkswagen approved, a full synthetic formula delivering complete protection across a wide range of vehicles.

edge-5w-40.description: An ideal fully synthetic motor oil for high-performance vehicles. MB, VW and Porsche approvals deliver maximum engine protection even under extreme conditions.

edge-0w-40.description: Developed for vehicles requiring performance across extreme temperature variations. Offers rapid cold-start flow combined with film stability at high temperatures.

edge-10w-60.description: A heavy-viscosity fully synthetic oil developed specifically for BMW M and Porsche high-performance engines. Maximum protection from the race track to everyday driving.

magnatec-5w-30.description: A fully synthetic motor oil with intelligent molecules that cling to engine parts. Provides superior protection from the very first start, even before oil circulates.

magnatec-5w-40.description: A fully synthetic Castrol Magnatec with superior stop-start protection. Anti-wear molecules adhere to engine surfaces providing protection through all operating phases.

magnatec-10w-40.description: A semi-synthetic Castrol Magnatec for everyday driving. Intelligent molecules provide constant engine protection especially during critical warm-up phases.

gtx-15w-40.description: A highly trusted mineral motor oil used by countless drivers worldwide. Provides reliable engine protection in older generation vehicles with a proven additive package.

gtx-20w-50.description: A high-viscosity mineral motor oil for hot climates and older high-mileage vehicles. Provides reliable protection and reduces oil consumption in worn engines.

vecton-15w-40.description: A professional-grade heavy-duty diesel engine oil for commercial vehicles. System Pro Technology maintains optimum viscosity regardless of operating conditions.

vecton-long-drain-10w-40.description: A long-drain capable heavy-duty diesel engine oil. Extended drain intervals reduce downtime and operating costs for commercial vehicle fleets.

hyspin-aws-32.description: A high-quality mineral hydraulic oil for industrial hydraulic systems. Excellent anti-wear and oxidation resistance for reliable system performance.

hyspin-aws-46.description: The most commonly used viscosity grade for industrial hydraulic systems. Reliable anti-wear performance and long system life in demanding applications.

hyspin-aws-68.description: A mineral hydraulic oil for heavy-duty systems operating at elevated temperatures. Maintains viscosity stability under high thermal stress.

hyspin-aws-100.description: A high-viscosity hydraulic oil for large hydraulic systems requiring extra protection under heavy loads and elevated temperatures.

optigear-bm-100.description: A high-quality EP mineral gear oil for closed industrial gearboxes. Delivers reliable gear protection under heavy loads with strong EP additive performance.

optigear-bm-220.description: An EP mineral gear oil in the most popular industrial viscosity for reducers and enclosed gearboxes. Excellent load-carrying capacity and oxidation stability.

tribol-1100-220.description: A high-performance EP gear oil developed for enclosed industrial gear drives. Excellent protection under heavy shock loads and vibration.

aircol-sn-46.description: A mineral-based rotary compressor oil providing reliable protection for air compressors. Designed to minimize carbon deposits and extend service life.

molub-alloy-860-220-2-el.description: A premium EP grease for heavily loaded bearings and open gears. Exceptional load-carrying capacity and adhesion for extreme operating conditions.

quartz-9000-energy-5w-30.description: A fully synthetic motor oil developed for modern European and Asian vehicles. Fuel economy focus with ACEA A5/B5 certification and broad OEM approvals.

quartz-9000-energy-5w-40.description: A high-performance fully synthetic motor oil for modern engines requiring A3/B4 protection. Delivers excellent engine cleanliness and extended protection.

quartz-9000-energy-0w-40.description: An ultra-low viscosity fully synthetic motor oil for premium European vehicles. Fast cold-start protection combined with robust high-temperature film strength.

quartz-9000-future-nfc-5w-30.description: A fully synthetic motor oil meeting latest fuel economy and emission requirements. NFC (New Formula Concept) technology delivers both fuel savings and engine cleanliness.

quartz-9000-future-ecob-5w-20.description: An ultra-fuel economy fully synthetic motor oil for hybrid and stop-start vehicles. EcoB technology maximizes fuel efficiency while maintaining engine protection.

quartz-ineo-ecs-5w-30.description: A fully synthetic motor oil specifically developed for PSA (Peugeot Citroen) diesel engines with DPF filters. ACEA C2 approved with very low SAPS levels.

quartz-7000-10w-40.description: A semi-synthetic motor oil for everyday use in both petrol and diesel engines. Provides reliable protection across a wide temperature range with good fuel economy.

quartz-5000-15w-40.description: A reliable mineral motor oil for older generation petrol and diesel engines. Meets standard maintenance requirements with proven additive technology.

rubia-tir-8600-15w-40.description: A high-performance mineral motor oil for Euro 3/4 heavy-duty diesel engines. Multi-OEM approvals provide reliable fleet protection with economical mineral technology.

rubia-tir-9200-5w-30.description: A synthetic technology motor oil for Euro 5/6 heavy-duty diesel engines. Excellent low-temperature performance and extended drain intervals reduce fleet operating costs.

evolution-900-sxr-5w-30.description: A fully synthetic Elf motor oil for modern petrol and diesel engines. PSA and Renault approved with excellent fuel economy and emission control.

evolution-900-ft-5w-40.description: A high-performance fully synthetic Elf motor oil for performance and mainstream vehicles. Wide OEM approvals and excellent high-temperature protection.

azolla-zs-32.description: A zinc-based anti-wear hydraulic oil for industrial hydraulic systems. Reliable protection at ISO VG 32 viscosity for standard industrial applications.

azolla-zs-46.description: A most popular viscosity zinc-based anti-wear hydraulic oil. Reliable performance for general industrial hydraulic systems with excellent pump protection.

azolla-zs-68.description: A zinc anti-wear hydraulic oil for systems operating at higher temperatures and under heavier loads. Good viscosity stability and anti-wear performance.

azolla-zs-100.description: A high-viscosity zinc anti-wear hydraulic oil for large hydraulic systems and slow-moving machinery. Extra load capacity with reliable long-term protection.

carter-ep-220.description: A high-performance EP gear oil for enclosed industrial gearboxes. Excellent EP additive protection and long oil life in demanding gear applications.

carter-ep-320.description: A heavy-duty EP gear oil for large industrial gearboxes operating under high loads. Strong EP additive package and good viscosity stability.

planetelf-acd-46.description: A synthetic compressor oil for refrigeration and air conditioning compressors. Excellent compatibility with refrigerants and long compressor life.

multis-ep-2.description: A multipurpose lithium complex EP grease for bearings, chassis and industrial applications. Excellent water resistance and load-carrying capacity.

biohydran-tmp-46.description: A biodegradable hydraulic oil based on synthetic ester for environmentally sensitive applications. Excellent performance combined with environmental compliance.

8100-x-cleanplus-5w-30.description: A fully synthetic motor oil meeting the latest Euro 6 emission standards and low-SAPS requirements. Protects DPF and petrol particulate filters while delivering excellent engine cleanliness.

8100-x-cess-gen2-5w-40.description: A second-generation fully synthetic motor oil developed for performance-oriented modern engines. Wide OEM approvals and excellent high-temperature protection.

8100-eco-nergy-0w-30.description: A fuel-economy focused fully synthetic motor oil with ultra-low viscosity. Reduces engine friction to deliver both fuel savings and complete engine protection.

8100-eco-lite-0w-20.description: An ultra-low viscosity fully synthetic motor oil for latest-generation fuel-efficient engines. Honda and Toyota approved, maximizing fuel economy without compromising protection.

300v-competition-5w-40.description: A racing-spec fully synthetic motor oil developed for high-revving competition engines. Ester-based formula delivers exceptional oil film stability under extreme racing conditions.

300v-high-rpm-0w-20.description: An ultra-low viscosity racing motor oil for high-revving engines. Optimized for maximum power delivery while maintaining film strength at extreme RPM.

300v-le-mans-20w-60.description: A high-viscosity racing motor oil developed for endurance racing engines. Exceptional film strength and thermal stability for sustained high-load operation.

specific-bmw-ll-04-5w-30.description: A fully synthetic motor oil specifically formulated to meet BMW LL-04 requirements. Protects BMW diesel engines with DPF systems while enabling extended drain intervals.

specific-vw-50800-0w-20.description: An ultra-low viscosity fully synthetic motor oil specifically formulated for VW Group's latest fuel economy specification. Delivers maximum fuel efficiency in modern VW Group engines.

truck-and-bus-15w-40.description: A mineral heavy-duty motor oil for light commercial vehicles, trucks and buses. CI-4/SL rated with E7 approval for reliable fleet protection.

gear-300-ls-75w-90.description: A fully synthetic gear oil with limited-slip additive for high-performance differentials and manual gearboxes. Excellent protection under extreme loads.

gear-300-75w-90.description: A fully synthetic gear oil for manual gearboxes and axles. Excellent protection across a wide temperature range with low viscosity for easy shifting.

atf-vi.description: A universal automatic transmission fluid meeting the latest ATF VI specification. Compatible with a wide range of automatic transmissions requiring low-viscosity fluid.

multi-dctf.description: A multi-purpose dual-clutch transmission fluid for DCT gearboxes. Protects both the clutch pack and gear sets while ensuring smooth power delivery.

hydraulic-sus-46.description: A mineral hydraulic oil for industrial hydraulic systems. Good anti-wear and oxidation stability for reliable system performance at ISO VG 46.

hydraulic-sus-68.description: A mineral hydraulic oil for systems operating at elevated temperatures and under heavier loads. Maintains performance in demanding industrial applications.

coolant-ultra-37.description: A G13 compatible engine coolant providing freeze protection to -37°C. Excellent corrosion protection for aluminum and ferrous metals in modern engines.

inugel-g13-ultra.description: A long-life G13 engine coolant with silicate-free organic acid technology. Excellent protection for all cooling system metals with extended service intervals.

multisyn-5w-30.description: Texol's core fully synthetic motor oil for modern petrol and diesel engines. Ford and GM approved formulation delivers fuel savings and superior protection.

multisyn-dpf-5w-30.description: An Ultra High Performance Low SAPS fully synthetic motor oil for DPF-equipped modern engines. Meets BMW, Mercedes-Benz and Volkswagen Group's highest emission control standards.

multisyn-5w-40.description: An ultra high performance fully synthetic motor oil for a wide range of vehicles. MB 229.3 and GM approved, with exceptional shear stability across a broad temperature range.

multisyn-10w-40.description: A high-performance semi-synthetic motor oil for petrol and diesel engines. VW and Mercedes-Benz approved with reliable everyday protection at an economical price.

multisyn-0w-20.description: A super high performance ultra-low viscosity fully synthetic motor oil. Ford EcoBoost and modern petrol engines benefit from maximum fuel economy and superior cold-start protection.

multisyn-c2-5w-30.description: A Low SAPS fully synthetic motor oil for PSA and Renault vehicles with FAP/DPF systems. ACEA C2 certified to extend catalytic converter and particulate filter service life.

multisyn-tdx-10w-40.description: An ultra high performance semi-synthetic heavy-duty diesel engine oil. Cummins, Mercedes-Benz, MAN, Volvo and Scania multi-OEM approvals provide extended service intervals for commercial fleets.

multisyn-15w-40-premium.description: A premium low SAPS heavy-duty motor oil formulated with TFAS technology. Caterpillar, Cummins and Volvo approvals for the most demanding commercial vehicle conditions.

multisyn-tdx-5w-30.description: A fuel-efficiency focused fully synthetic heavy-duty motor oil. MB, MAN and Volvo approved for Euro V engines delivering reduced fuel consumption and extended service intervals.

multisyn-10w-60.description: A fully synthetic motor oil for extreme performance and high-load conditions. Very high viscosity index provides maximum film protection across a wide temperature range for sport and race engines.

multisyn-tdx-5w-30-plus.description: The most comprehensive OEM-approved fully synthetic heavy-duty motor oil for Euro VI engines. Caterpillar, MAN, Volvo, Scania and Cummins — the widest approval portfolio in the segment.

hydraulic-32.description: A Texol mineral hydraulic oil at ISO VG 32 for light-duty industrial hydraulic systems. Reliable anti-wear protection and good filterability.

hydraulic-46.description: A Texol mineral hydraulic oil at ISO VG 46, the most popular hydraulic viscosity grade. Reliable protection for standard industrial hydraulic systems.

hydraulic-68.description: A Texol hydraulic oil for systems operating at elevated temperatures or under heavier loads. Good thermal stability and anti-wear performance.

gear-oil-220.description: A Texol EP gear oil at ISO VG 220 for enclosed industrial gearboxes and reducers. Reliable EP protection and good oxidation stability.

gear-oil-320.description: A Texol high-viscosity EP gear oil for heavily loaded slow-speed industrial gearboxes. Strong EP additive and long drain capability.

compressor-46.description: A Texol mineral compressor oil for air compressors. Good oxidation stability and low carbon deposit tendency for reliable compressor service life.

grease-ep-2.description: A Texol NLGI 2 lithium EP grease for general industrial bearing and chassis applications. Good water resistance and load-carrying capacity.

slideway-68.description: A Texol slideway oil at ISO VG 68 for machine tool guideways. Anti-stick-slip properties ensure smooth precise feed motion.

havoline-prods-5w-30.description: A fully synthetic Texaco Havoline ProDS motor oil for modern petrol and diesel engines. Meets ACEA C3 for DPF-equipped vehicles with broad European OEM approvals.

havoline-prods-5w-40.description: A fully synthetic Texaco Havoline ProDS motor oil meeting ACEA A3/B4 for high-performance engines. Broad OEM approvals and excellent high-temperature protection.

havoline-extra-10w-40.description: A semi-synthetic Texaco Havoline motor oil for everyday driving. Reliable protection for both petrol and diesel engines with good fuel economy.

havoline-motor-oil-20w-50.description: A high-viscosity Texaco Havoline mineral motor oil for hot climates and older engines. Provides reliable engine protection where higher viscosity is needed.

havoline-synthetic-5w-30.description: A fully synthetic Texaco Havoline motor oil with broad vehicle compatibility. Meets ACEA A5/B5 for fuel-economy focused applications.

havoline-0w-20.description: An ultra-low viscosity fully synthetic Texaco Havoline motor oil for the latest fuel-efficient engines. Delivers maximum fuel economy while maintaining engine protection.

ursa-premium-tdx-15w-40.description: A heavy-duty diesel engine oil for trucks and commercial vehicles. Multi-OEM approvals including Volvo VDS-3 and Cummins provide reliable fleet protection.

ursa-super-plus-10w-40.description: A semi-synthetic heavy-duty diesel engine oil. Provides reliable protection for mixed fleets with broad OEM approvals and good fuel economy.

delo-400-mgx-15w-40.description: A Texaco Delo 400 heavy-duty diesel engine oil with broad OEM approvals. Advanced additive technology for extended drain capability and deposit control.

delo-400-xsp-5w-40.description: A fully synthetic Texaco Delo 400 XSP motor oil for heavy-duty engines. Provides maximum protection in the most demanding operating conditions.

meropa-xl-220.description: A Texaco Meropa XL EP gear oil for enclosed industrial gearboxes. Long life and reliable EP protection in demanding industrial applications.

meropa-xl-320.description: A heavy-duty Texaco Meropa XL EP gear oil for large industrial gearboxes. Strong EP additive package for high-load low-speed applications.

meropa-xl-460.description: A very high viscosity Texaco Meropa XL EP gear oil for the most heavily loaded slow-speed gearboxes. Maximum film thickness and EP protection.

rando-hdz-32.description: A Texaco Rando HDZ high VI hydraulic oil for mobile and industrial applications in variable temperature environments. Excellent pump protection and system performance.

rando-hdz-46.description: A Texaco Rando HDZ high VI hydraulic oil at the most popular industrial viscosity. Reliable performance across temperature variations with excellent anti-wear properties.

rando-hdz-68.description: A Texaco Rando HDZ high VI hydraulic oil for heavy-duty systems in variable temperature conditions. Strong performance under high loads and temperatures.

cetus-pao-46.description: A PAO-based fully synthetic compressor oil for rotary air compressors. Extended service intervals and excellent thermal stability for high-efficiency compressor operation.

multifak-ep-2.description: A Texaco Multifak EP 2 multipurpose lithium EP grease for industrial and automotive applications. Good water resistance and broad temperature capability.

novatex-gp-2.description: A Texaco Novatex general-purpose lithium grease for chassis and light industrial applications. Reliable protection and good mechanical stability.

quotePage.headline: Request a Bulk Quote
quotePage.subheadline: Fill in your product requirements below. Our export team responds within 24 business hours with competitive pricing, full specification sheets, and export documentation.
quotePage.trust1Desc: Our export team reviews every inquiry within one business day.
quotePage.trust2Desc: COA, MSDS, Certificate of Origin, and country-specific compliance documents included.
quotePage.trust3Desc: Every batch is tested against specification before shipment.
quotePage.trust4Desc: A quote is just information. You decide whether to proceed.
quotePage.availableHours: Available Mon–Fri, 09:00–17:00 (GMT+3). WhatsApp preferred for international calls.
quotePage.faq1q: What is the minimum order quantity?
quotePage.faq1a: Our minimum bulk order starts at 1,000 liters (typically 5× 205L drums). For IBC quantities, minimum is 1 unit (1,000L). Bulk tanker from 20,000L.
quotePage.faq2q: How long does it take to receive a quotation?
quotePage.faq2a: Standard turnaround is 24–48 business hours. Complex multi-product or custom spec inquiries may take slightly longer.
quotePage.faq3a: We support EXW, FOB, CFR, CIF, DAP, and DDP. Your preferred Incoterm should be noted in the Additional Notes field.
quotePage.faq4q: Can you supply API and ACEA certified products?
quotePage.faq4a: Yes. Our motor oil range carries API SN, SN+, CF, CK-4 and ACEA A3/B4, C3, E7, E9 certifications. Specific approvals are listed on each product page.

productsPage.headline: Motor Oils, Mineral Oils & Industrial Lubricants
productsPage.subheadline: 500+ products across three categories. All ISO certified, API compliant, with full technical documentation.
productsPage.customSpecBody: Our technical team can match the correct product to your engine type, OEM specification, and operating conditions.
productsPage.cat1Desc: SAE-graded engine oils for passenger cars, commercial vehicles, and heavy-duty diesel engines. API and ACEA certified.
productsPage.cat2Desc: White mineral oils, process oils, transformer oils, and specialty mineral base oils for industrial and pharmaceutical applications.
productsPage.cat3Desc: Hydraulic oils, compressor oils, gear oils, metalworking fluids, and greases for industrial machinery and equipment.

blogPage.headline: Resources for Industrial Buyers
blogPage.subheadline: Technical guides, export insights, and lubricant knowledge base for procurement managers and importers.
blogPage.noPostsBody: We are currently publishing our technical guide series. Check back shortly.
blogPage.ctaBody: Our technical team answers product specification, OEM approval, and application questions directly.

solutions.ctaBody: Our export team responds within 24 hours with pricing, specifications, and documentation.

fleet.title: Fleet Operators
fleet.headline: Consistent Engine Oil Supply for Commercial Fleets
fleet.subheadline: Stop managing multiple oil suppliers. We supply SAE-graded motor oils for diesel and petrol fleets in bulk. ISO certified, API rated, consistent across every order.
fleet.p1: Inconsistent oil quality causing early drain intervals
fleet.p3: Rising fleet maintenance costs from premium retail lubricants
fleet.p4: Documentation requirements from OEM warranty programs
fleet.p5: No dedicated account manager for re-order coordination
fleet.s1t: Bulk Pricing That Scales With Your Fleet
fleet.s1d: From 1,000L trial orders to full bulk tanker quantities. Price per liter drops significantly at IBC and tanker volumes.
fleet.s2d: Our technical team matches the correct API SN, CJ-4, or CK-4 specification to your fleet's OEM requirements.
fleet.s3d: ISO 9001:2015 quality management and batch-specific COA on every order. Same formulation, same performance, every delivery.
fleet.s4d: Monthly, quarterly, or annual supply agreements. Proactive lead time communication so you never face an unplanned stock-out.
fleet.testimonial: We switched from three separate local suppliers to Model Oils for our entire 200-vehicle fleet. Pricing improved, documentation improved, and we haven't had a specification mismatch in 18 months.
fleet.faq1q: What is the minimum order for fleet supply?
fleet.faq1a: Minimum bulk order is 1,000L (typically 5x 205L drums). We recommend starting with a trial order before committing to a supply agreement.
fleet.faq2q: Can you supply API CK-4 certified oil for modern diesel engines?
fleet.faq2a: Yes. Our SAE 15W-40 HD diesel oil carries API CK-4 certification, backward compatible with CJ-4 and CI-4.
fleet.faq3q: Do you offer price-lock agreements for fleet operators?
fleet.faq3a: Yes. 6-month and 12-month price-lock agreements are available for verified fleet operators committing to minimum quarterly volumes.
fleet.faq4q: Can I mix products across multiple specifications in one shipment?
fleet.faq4a: Yes. We regularly ship multi-product orders in a single container with separate COA for each batch.

distributors.title: Automotive Distributors
distributors.headline: Reliable Wholesale Motor Oil Supply for Distributors
distributors.subheadline: Establish a consistent supply of API and ACEA certified motor oils for your distribution network. Private label, co-packing, and custom formulation available.
distributors.p1: Unreliable supplier causing stock gaps in your distribution network
distributors.p2: No private label option from current manufacturer
distributors.p3: API and ACEA certifications required by automotive sector buyers
distributors.p4: Inconsistent quality complaints from end customers
distributors.p5: High cost of maintaining multiple source suppliers
distributors.s1d: We supply products under your label with your branding on drums and IBCs. Minimum private label run is 5,000L.
distributors.s2t: Full API and ACEA Certification Portfolio
distributors.s2d: API SN, SN+, CF, CK-4, and ACEA A3/B4, C3, E7, E9 across our motor oil range.
distributors.s3d: Volume-based pricing with additional margin for distributors committing to quarterly minimum orders.
distributors.s4d: COA, MSDS, Certificate of Origin, and country-specific compliance documents. Your end customers clear customs without delays.
distributors.testimonial: We moved our entire product range to Model Oils as our single source supplier 14 months ago. Private label setup was straightforward, and the API documentation satisfied our local trade authority requirements immediately.
distributors.faq1q: What is the minimum for private label production?
distributors.faq1a: Minimum private label run is 5,000L per SKU. Lead time from label artwork approval to dispatch is 10-14 working days.
distributors.faq2q: Can you supply ACEA A3/B4 for European passenger car distribution?
distributors.faq2a: Yes. Our 5W-30 and 5W-40 synthetic oils are formulated and tested to ACEA A3/B4 and C3 sequences.
distributors.faq3q: Do you work with exclusive distributor agreements?
distributors.faq3a: Yes, for select markets. Exclusive distributor status requires a minimum annual volume commitment, reviewed quarterly.
distributors.faq4q: How do you handle quality complaints from my end customers?
distributors.faq4a: All batches are traceable via COA batch numbers. We investigate within 48 hours and provide a written response.

industrial.title: Industrial Companies
industrial.headline: Industrial Lubricants for Manufacturing and Processing Plants
industrial.subheadline: Hydraulic fluids, gear oils, compressor oils, and specialty lubricants for industrial machinery. ISO VG graded, OEM specification matched, available in drums, IBCs, and bulk tanker.
industrial.p1: Multiple lubricant types from multiple suppliers creating procurement complexity
industrial.p2: High per-liter cost of branded industrial lubricants from major OEMs
industrial.p3: Difficulty sourcing ISO VG grades not stocked by local distributors
industrial.p4: Need for OEM approval documentation for warranty compliance
industrial.p5: Inconsistent lead times causing unplanned production downtime
industrial.s1t: Full Industrial Lubricant Range Under One Supplier
industrial.s1d: Hydraulic oils (ISO VG 32/46/68/100), gear oils (GL-4/GL-5), compressor oils, greases, and metalworking fluids. Consolidate procurement.
industrial.s2d: We stock or can formulate any ISO VG grade to DIN 51524, ISO 6743, or manufacturer specification.
industrial.s3d: Annual supply agreements with quarterly delivery scheduling. Consistent pricing, consistent specification, dedicated account manager.
industrial.s4d: Our lubricants engineers can review your current product slate and identify consolidation opportunities.
industrial.testimonial: We consolidated from seven separate lubricant suppliers down to two. The cost reduction was significant, and technical support has been excellent.
industrial.testimonialRole: Procurement Manager, Eastern European Manufacturing Group
industrial.faq1q: Do you supply lubricants to ISO 6743 classification?
industrial.faq1a: Yes. Our industrial lubricant range covers ISO 6743 categories including HLP hydraulic fluids, CKD gear oils, VDL compressor oils, and others.
industrial.faq2q: Can you cross-reference against major OEM lubricant specifications?
industrial.faq2a: Yes. Our technical team maintains cross-reference tables against Bosch Rexroth, Parker, Sauer-Danfoss, and other major hydraulic OEM specifications.
industrial.faq3q: What is the lead time for industrial lubricants?
industrial.faq3a: Standard grades are available from stock with 5-10 working day lead time. Custom ISO VG grades require 15-20 working days.
industrial.faq4q: Do you offer a lubricant audit service?
industrial.faq4a: Yes. For qualified buyers considering a supply agreement, we offer a complimentary lubricant portfolio review.

importers.title: Lubricant Importers
importers.headline: A Reliable Turkish Export Partner for Lubricant Importers
importers.subheadline: Istanbul-based lubricant exporter with 15+ years of international trade experience. Consistent product quality, competitive FOB/CIF pricing, full customs documentation.
importers.p1: Difficulty finding a reliable manufacturer that also handles export documentation
importers.p2: Quality inconsistency between batches from trading companies
importers.p4: High minimum order quantities from major lubricant brands
importers.p5: Limited flexibility on Incoterms and payment terms
importers.s1t: Direct Manufacturer, Not a Trading Company
importers.s1d: We blend and package lubricants in our Istanbul facility. No intermediary, no margin stacking, no quality variability.
importers.s2d: Our trade compliance team prepares every document required for your import clearance. No third-party delays.
importers.s3d: EXW, FOB, CFR, CIF, DAP, or DDP. T/T or L/C at sight. First order typically 30/70 T/T; established buyers can negotiate net terms.
importers.s4d: Single point of contact from order confirmation to delivery at destination port. Proactive updates on production, loading, and estimated arrival.
importers.testimonial: As an importer handling customs clearance in three different countries, documentation accuracy is critical for us. Model Oils has not had a single documentation error in 23 shipments across 18 months.
importers.testimonialRole: Import and Logistics Manager, Southeast Asia
importers.faq1q: Are you a manufacturer or a trading company?
importers.faq1a: We are a manufacturer and exporter. All blending and packaging takes place at our Istanbul facility. We do not resell third-party products.
importers.faq2q: What are your typical lead times?
importers.faq2a: Standard stock products: 5-7 working days from proforma confirmation. Custom formulations or private label: 15-20 working days.
importers.faq3q: Can you prepare documentation for specific country import requirements?
importers.faq3a: Yes. We have experience exporting to 40+ countries and maintain current knowledge of country-specific requirements.
importers.faq4q: Do you have an existing importer in my country?
importers.faq4a: We work directly with importers in most markets. Exclusivity agreements are available for importers committing to minimum annual volumes.

solutions.indexSubtitle: Specialized lubricant solutions for automotive fleets, distributors, industrial companies, and importers worldwide.

catalogsPage.ctaBody: Our export team can provide COA, MSDS, TDS, and other compliance documents tailored to your destination country.
catalogsPage.catalog1Desc: Complete overview of our motor oil, mineral oil, and industrial lubricant product range. Includes specifications, viscosity grades, and OEM approvals for all brands we export.
